title: carduus defloratus subsp. glaucus
intro: Carduus defloratus subsp. glaucus, also known as the gray-headed thistle or gray thistle, is a subspecies of thistle that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Carduus defloratus subsp. glaucus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
